title: Colors Missing?
excerpt: I have color coded my columns, but when I try to apply those same colors to a board item, they aren’t available in the color menu. And when I go back to a column, the color I used is often no longer available?!?! Like, t…

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml: I have color coded my columns, but when I try to apply those same colors to a board item, they aren’t available in the color menu. And when I go back to a column, the color I used is often no longer available?!?! Like, the column is bright red, but bright red is no loner in the color picker. If I change the color of the column to (hypothertically, blue), I cant make it the same bright red it was previously because the color is no longer available. This is maddening. Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Forgot to attach and image of the color picker. You can see the swatch is no longer in the palette.

Screenshot 2024-09-29 at 10.32.24 AM358×714 20.2 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Scott-Pigeon - A color can only be assigned to a single label within a Status column. Once it is in use it will disappear.

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml: Ahhh. . . Thank you so much for the info. Makes sense.
